docs.title: 🌌 Genesis Project
docs.text: Genesis is the realization of a platform that scales not just infrastructure, but engineering intent. This repo serves as the living roadmap and architectural record.

docs.title: 🗺 Quick Navigation
docs.text: Epoch Focus Status I: Foundation K8s, Crossplane, GitOps 🚧 In Progress II: Logic Rust Core, Low-Level Systems 📅 Planned III: Scale Multi-region, Self-healing 🔭 Vision

docs.title: 🧠 Latest Thoughts (The Brain Shed)
docs.text:
• Networking: Considering Cilium over standard VPC CNI for better observability at the kernel level.
  • Tooling: Need to integrate Zed-friendly task runners for the Rust build cycle.

docs.title: Status
docs.text: Proposed

docs.title: Context
docs.text: The platform requires a systems-oriented implementation language for performance-sensitive and correctness-sensitive components.

docs.title: Decision
docs.text: Adopt Rust for the core logic layer.

docs.title: Consequences
docs.text:
• Strong compile-time guarantees
  • Lower-level control over performance characteristics
  • Higher upfront implementation rigor

docs.title: Archive
docs.text: This page holds older journal entries that are no longer part of the active design thread.

docs.title: Notes
docs.text:
• Move superseded thoughts here.
  • Keep the active journal focused on current decisions.

docs.title: Recent Thoughts
docs.text: This page is the active working journal for current ideas, tradeoffs, and design notes.

docs.title: Notes
docs.text:
• Capture short-form observations here.
  • Promote durable decisions into ADRs.

docs.title: Epoch I: Foundation
docs.text: This epoch defines the platform baseline: cluster shape, control plane boundaries, GitOps flow, and initial delivery standards.

docs.title: Scope
docs.text:
• Kubernetes foundation
  • Crossplane resource orchestration
  • GitOps deployment workflow

docs.title: Current Direction
docs.text: Capture the first production-capable platform slice here as the design settles.

docs.title: Epoch II: Logic (Rust)
docs.text: This epoch focuses on the system logic layer implemented in Rust, with an emphasis on correctness, performance, and explicit operational behavior.

docs.title: Scope
docs.text:
• Core services in Rust
  • Low-level systems integration
  • Reliability and runtime model

docs.title: Current Direction
docs.text: Document the service boundaries and core runtime contracts here.

docs.title: Epoch III: Scale
docs.text: This epoch covers scaling the platform beyond a single-region operating model into a more autonomous and resilient system.

docs.title: Scope
docs.text:
• Multi-region architecture
  • Self-healing platform controls
  • Progressive resilience improvements

docs.title: Current Direction
docs.text: Use this page to track the long-range operating model and scale milestones.
